attacking_style: Attacks from early breakaways on final repetitions of circuit climbs, using accumulated fatigue to drop rivals on the decisive ascent.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to determine team setup patterns. Appears to operate independently once in breakaway position.
terrain_preference: Specialized for repetitive circuit climbs where multiple ascents create cumulative fatigue. Stage finish profiles with repeated moderate gradients suit perfectly.
vulnerability: Unknown from available data - single race sample insufficient to identify weaknesses.
key_patterns: Wins from early breakaways rather than reduced bunch sprints or late attacks.
Excels on final repetitions of climbs after multiple earlier ascents wear down rivals.
Proven success profile on repetitive circuit climbs across multiple victories (Malbun, Kasen).
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated consistent specialized climbing ability with stage victory matching previous win profile
